---
title: "Result"
author: "Ka Long"
date: "11/17/2021"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r load-library, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
require(knitr)
require(arsenal)
require(readr)
require(car)
```

```{r, load-data, , echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
dataset2 <- read_csv("dataset2.csv")
dataset2 <- as.data.frame(unclass(dataset2),stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
dataset2$age_r <- dataset2$age
dataset2$age_r <- recode(dataset2$age_r, "c('18-24 years')='18-24 years';c('25-44 years') = '25-44 years';c('45-64 years', '65 years or above') = '45 years or above'")
```

## Demographic information


```{r demographic, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ age + age_r + gender + self_own + private_housing + living_with_family + edu_r + occupation_status + occupation_status_r + occupation + salary + covid_living_building_r + district, data=dataset2))
```

## Spirituality

```{r spirituality, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ FACIT_meaning + FACIT_peace + FACIT_faith, data=dataset2))
```

## Religion behaviour and belief

```{r religion, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ religion_scale_1 + religion_scale_2_r_attend + religion_scale_3_r_pray + religion_scale_4_r_study + religion_scale_5_r_health_important, data=dataset2))
```

## Perceived Stress

```{r stress, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ IES_intrusion + IES_avoidance + IES_hyperarousal, data=dataset2))
```

## Coping

```{r coping, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ Brief_RCOPE_postive + Brief_RCOPE_negative, data=dataset2))
```

## Mental Health

```{r mental, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(~ HADS_anxiety + HADS_anxiety_group_r + HADS_depression + HADS_depression_group_r + HADS_group_normal, data=dataset2))
```

## Difference

```{r difference, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(tableby(religion_scale_2_r_attend_r ~ religion_scale_1 + religion_scale_3_r_pray + religion_scale_4_r_study_r_almost_each_day + FACIT_meaning + FACIT_peace + FACIT_faith + IES_intrusion + IES_avoidance + IES_hyperarousal + Brief_RCOPE_postive + Brief_RCOPE_negative + HADS_anxiety + HADS_depression + log(sdi) + age_r + gender + bachelor_above, data=dataset2))
```

## Regression Result

```{r Regression, results='asis', echo = FALSE}
summary(modelsum(religion_scale_2_r_attend_r ~ religion_scale_1, adjust= ~religion_scale_3_r_pray + FACIT_meaning + FACIT_peace + FACIT_faith + IES_intrusion + IES_avoidance + IES_hyperarousal + Brief_RCOPE_postive + Brief_RCOPE_negative + HADS_anxiety + HADS_depression + log(sdi) + age_r + gender + bachelor_above, data=dataset2, family = binomial, 
                         #binomial.stats=c("OR", "CI.lower.OR", "CI.upper.OR", "p.value", "concordance", "statistic", "logLik", "AIC", "BIC")
                         ), term.name = TRUE)
```
